SEARCH
Package opennlp.service

Interface CacheAware<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The type of service objects stored in the service cache.
All Known Subinterfaces:
ModelAware<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
PosTaggerService, SentenceDetectorService, TokenizerService
public interface CacheAware<T>
Interface representing a cache-aware component for managing service and model caches.

The CacheAware interface defines methods to retrieve and manage in-memory caches for services and ClassPathModel objects. It also provides a default method to clear these caches, ensuring proper resource management.

Implementations of this interface can use the provided methods to access and maintain caches in a thread-safe manner, and to clean up resources when necessary.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    clearCaches()
    Clears the in-memory caches for services and models.
    Map<String,opennlp.tools.models.ClassPathModel>
    getModelCache()
    Returns the model cache containing ClassPathModel objects.
    Map<String,T>
    getServiceCache()
    Returns the service cache containing service objects of type T.

  • Method Details

    • clearCaches

      default void clearCaches()
      Clears the in-memory caches for services and models.

      This method ensures that all cached services and ClassPathModel objects are removed from their respective caches, freeing up memory and resources.

      Thread Safety: The method synchronizes access to the underlying caches to ensure safe removal of taggers in a multithreaded environment.

      Use Case: This method is useful for scenarios where the cached models or taggers need to be reloaded, such as after configuration changes or when the service needs to release memory during shutdown.

      No exceptions are thrown by this method; any exceptions occurring during the closing of taggers are caught and ignored.

    • getModelCache

      Map<String,opennlp.tools.models.ClassPathModel> getModelCache()
      Returns the model cache containing ClassPathModel objects.

      The returned cache maps unique string identifiers (e.g., model names or paths) to their corresponding ClassPathModel instances.

      Returns:
      A Map representing the model cache.

    • getServiceCache

      Map<String,T> getServiceCache()
      Returns the service cache containing service objects of type T.

      The returned cache maps unique string identifiers to their corresponding service objects. Service objects can be of any type, as defined by the generic parameter T.

      Returns:
      A Map representing the service cache.
